option.name: originalContent
option.value:
providers = ["node"]
[phases.setup] nixPkgs = ["nodejs_20"]
[phases.install] cmds = ["npm ci || npm install"]
[phases.build] cmds = ["npx prisma generate"]
[start] cmd = "npx prisma db push && node src/index.js"

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
providers = ["node"]
[phases.setup] nixPkgs = ["nodejs_20", "npm-9_x"]
[phases.install] cmds = ["npm ci || npm install"]
[phases.build] cmds = ["npx prisma generate"]
[start] cmd = "npx prisma db push && node src/index.js"

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[build] builder = "nixpacks"
[build.nixpacks] pkgs = ["nodejs_20"]
[deploy] startCommand = "npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && node src/index.js" healthcheckPath = "/api/health" healthcheckTimeout = 100 restartPolicyType = "on_failure" restartPolicyMaxRetries = 3

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[build] builder = "nixpacks"
[build.nixpacks] pkgs = ["nodejs_20", "npm-9_x"]
[deploy] startCommand = "npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && node src/index.js" healthcheckPath = "/api/health" healthcheckTimeout = 100 restartPolicyType = "on_failure" restartPolicyMaxRetries = 3
